original_request.subject: URGENT: Complete data loss after today's update — all reports gone
original_request.message: After the v2.5.0 update deployed this morning ALL of our historical reports have disappeared from the dashboard. 3000+ records are gone. Our entire finance team is blocked and we have an external audit tomorrow. Steps to reproduce: 1. Log in  2. Navigate to Reports  3. Dashboard is empty. This is a system-down, data-loss situation — we need an immediate fix.
